instruction: Generate Prisma ORM query to get all active users
output: const users = await prisma.user.findMany({ where: { status: 1 } });

instruction: Count total orders for each month in 2025
output: const orders = await prisma.purchase_order_master.groupBy({ by: ['month'], _count: { id: true }, where: { year: 2025 } });

instruction: Get list of fund types where status is active
output: const funds = await prisma.fund_type.findMany({ where: { fty_status: 1 }, select: { fty_fund_type: true, fty_fund_desc: true } });

instruction: Generate report of total sales by cost centre
output: const result = await prisma.sales.groupBy({ by: ['ccr_costcentre'], _sum: { amount: true } });

instruction: Get distinct fund types with label format type - description
output: const result = await prisma.fund_type.findMany({ distinct: ['fty_fund_type'], select: { fty_fund_type: true, fty_fund_desc: true } }).then(data => data.map(f => ({ value: f.fty_fund_type, label: `${f.fty_fund_type} - ${f.fty_fund_desc}` })));
